dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions detect price touching/breaching lower Bollinger Band (2 std dev) which identifies sell-off exhaustion in ranging markets. Exit when price recovers to upper band. The signal references 'extreme volumes' in source text but volume indicators are not primary to the Bollinger Band rule itself, so entry focuses on price-band interaction. Bollinger Bands with 2 standard deviations map directly to bb_upper and bb_lower indicators.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions detect price touching/breaching lower Bollinger Band (2 std dev) which identifies sell-off exhaustion in ranging markets. source_rule_text: Use Bollinger bands (2 standard deviations) as substitutes for fixed percentage thresholds to identify end of sell-offs in stock markets.
